title: begonia androturba
intro: Begonia androturba is a species of flowering plant in the family Begoniaceae, commonly known as the Andaman Begonia, native to the Andaman Islands in India. It is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been used to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Begonia androturba include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve digestion. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or a tincture, and is also used in herbal preparations such as infusions and ointments.
